title: coelogyne carnea var. parviflora
intro: Coelogyne carnea var. parviflora, also known as the small-flowered Coelogyne, is a variety of orchid native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Coelogyne carnea var. parviflora include reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and soothing digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or infusion to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses.
